DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (GABRIEL LIRA) FILED BY DEFENDANT YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF STEVEN O'CONNOR APPEARED. DEFENDANT YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY GABRIEL LIRA, PROPERTY MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. BOTH EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108A) IS DENIED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'CONNOR, STEVEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'CONNOR, STEVEN
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER*** FILED BY DEFENDANT YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES
